limitations: Synthetic ECG only — no real-patient validation yet.
Frequency-encoded inputs; not a clinical waveform analyser.
Rate-regime triage only; no morphology, no AF, no VT, no ST analysis.
Not a medical device. Research / embedded prototype only.

next_step: Run python python/download_mitbih.py and python python/preprocess.py to populate data/processed/{train,test}/, then re-run with --records-dir <those>.
